name: Millburn Indoor Golf Club
about: Millburn Indoor Golf Club is an indoor golf training facility equipped with premium TrackMan technology. The venue offers a range of services including private coaching, performance training, and fitness programs, all designed to help golfers improve their game. With multiple bays featuring TrackMan-4 and TrackMan-IO launch monitors, the facility provides data-driven practice and simulation options for golfers of all skill levels. Pricing is structured around hourly bay rentals, lessons, and membership options, catering to both individual players and groups seeking to refine their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan-4 and TrackMan-IO launch monitors provide detailed shot data
Expert coaching from PGA Class A professionals and sport psychologists
Convenient downtown location with ample parking and easy booking system
Variety of services including fitness programs and performance analysis

food_and_drink.notes: Located in Downtown Millburn with access to food and drinks nearby
No information provided about alcohol service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to practice and play at Millburn Indoor Golf Club.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: You can bring your own food and drinks, and the venue is located near restaurants and bars in Downtown Millburn for additional options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2.5 hours depending on the simulator and number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Millburn Indoor Golf Club is kid-friendly and offers coaching programs for juniors and youth players.
